asset.title: L4 Draft
asset.purpose: Silent workflow preview generated from app captures or trace replays. Judge whether it communicates the workflow and gate clearly.

judge.summary: A clear, step-by-step workflow preview demonstrating how an AI agent handles locked spreadsheet ranges by creating a draft version instead of overwriting.

featureClarity.evidence: The UI clearly shows the transition of a cell from a locked state to a drafted state with explicit labels.

workflowCompleteness.evidence: Demonstrates the full sequence: initial locked state, agent reading/confirming, and final draft generation.

visualDesign.evidence: Clean dark-mode layout with high-contrast text and a clear step indicator at the bottom.

consistency.evidence: Aligns with the spreadsheet and agent-trace paradigm of the platform.

evidenceQuality.evidence: High-fidelity capture of the UI state transitions and agent execution steps.

legibility.evidence: All text, including the small status chips and agent logs, is highly readable.

professionalRelevance.evidence: Highly relevant for financial and enterprise workflows where data locking and audit trails are critical.

productionHonesty.evidence: Accurately depicts the step-by-step logic and constraints of the agent's environment.

observedEvidence: Step-by-step progress bar (1/5 to 5/5) at the bottom
Transition of Net income / variance row from empty to +22.4% with a DRAFT label
Agent status logs explaining each action in real-time
judge.suggestedReadmeCaption: Watch how the NodeRoom agent respects locked ranges by automatically drafting changes for a smart-merge once unlocked.
